rules.Aura of Discipline: 6" Aura, unit may use Commissar's Ld and gains Stubborn
rules.Send in the Next Wave: In your Command Phase, you may spawn an existing Conscript unit from your list that has been destroyed or declare an existing Conscript unit dead by removing them from the fields. This replacement unit moves onto the table edge of your deployment zone as if it had Outflanked. This may only occur once per Round and may affect the same unit any number of times over the course of the game.

wargear.Augar Array: 6" Aura, target unit does not scatter when Deepstriking. This Aura is cast when the first model is placed prior to scattering.

wargear.Smoke Launchers: 6" range, put 5" Smoke Cloud that causes -1 to Hit and scatters to move an extra +1" until your Command Phase. One Use Only. Use in your Shooting Phase Only.
wargear.Standard: This inspiring battle flag gives the model equipped the following Auras: Tests.
wargear.Vox Caster: This model's unit may reroll failed Order Tests if the model Issuing the Order has a Vox Caster in its unit and the target unit has one as well. All Vehicles and Monsters in this Codex are considered equipped with Vox Casters.

rules.name: Command Dependent
rules.description: All models gain Stubborn, but may only perform the following actions when a HQ or Advisor Slot is within 12"; Move, Advance, Charge.

rules.name: Poorly Equipped
rules.description: All Infantry and Monstrous Infantry models Sv Stats are Sv -. This does not affect unique characters.

rules.name: Acceptable Losses
rules.description: Any unit may choose to test Ld to shoot into close combat with friendly models involved. If passed, they may place Flame and Blast templates over friendly models this turn. All natural rolls of a 1 to hit automatically hit a friendly unit at random involved in the melee, chosen by the owner how to allocate the wounds and saves like normal. Templates Hit all models underneath them like normal.
